prerequisites: An active deepset AI Platform (deepset Cloud / Haystack Enterprise Platform) account.
An existing workspace in your deepset account where synced data will be stored (the required `workspace` config field).
A deepset API key generated from your account settings (the required `api_key` config field).

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a deepset API key supplied in the `api_key` field. The platform performs machine-to-machine authentication using an API key generated in the deepset UI, sent as a Bearer token in the HTTP Authorization header. Each key inherits the permissions and workspace access of the user or service identity that created it.

setupSteps.title: Generate a deepset API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to deepset and click your profile icon in the top right, then select Settings. Navigate to Workspace > API Keys (for access to a single workspace) or Organization > API Keys (for access to all workspaces), and click Create API Key. Choose a type (service keys are recommended for production integrations), optionally set a name and expiration, select a role, then click Create API Key. Copy and save the key immediately, because it remains masked after creation.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key
setupSteps.body: Enter the generated key in the required `api_key` field. This is the secret credential used to authenticate every request.

setupSteps.title: Set the target workspace
setupSteps.body: Enter the name of an existing deepset workspace in the required `workspace` field. Synced data is written to this workspace.

setupSteps.title: Configure the base URL (optional)
setupSteps.body: Set the optional `base_url` field to match your deepset environment. It defaults to the EU endpoint `https://api.cloud.deepset.ai`. Use `https://api.us.deepset.ai` for US-based accounts, or a custom URL for an on-premise deployment.

setupSteps.title: Tune retries (optional)
setupSteps.body: Set the optional `retries` field to control how many times a record is retried before it is marked failed. It defaults to 5 attempts.
